overallText: Several of your results need prompt attention, and your care team is contacting you directly about them. Please expect a call. Your other results are in the typical range.

perTest.text: Your potassium is high and the lab flagged it. Your care team is reaching out to you directly about this result.
Your calcium is low and the lab flagged it. Your care team is reaching out to you directly about this result.
Your hemoglobin is low and the lab flagged it. Your care team is reaching out to you directly about this result.
Your sodium is within the typical range. Sodium helps balance the fluids in your body.
Your blood sugar after fasting is within the typical range.
